purpose: Track emergent AI capex segments after removing already crowded A-share mappings.
framework_fit: Part of the core AI capex framework: start from future system bottlenecks, then look for company-level evidence and crowding gaps. KOLs, sell-side notes and social reads are only idea feeds, not the source of conviction.

remove_as_early_ideas.reason: Already repeatedly traded as an AI capex consensus direction.

remove_as_early_ideas.bucket: AI PCB / CCL / electronic glass fabric
remove_as_early_ideas.reason: Core logic remains strong, but the obvious A-share mappings are already crowded.
Many names have already been repriced by memory-cycle and AI-storage narratives.

remove_as_early_ideas.bucket: Visible copper interconnect / high-speed cable names
remove_as_early_ideas.reason: The theme has already spread beyond first-tier optical names.
The market has already named the direct liquid-cooling beneficiaries.
Several server-power names have explicit AI data-center coverage and price moves.
Names such as JPT have already moved sharply and should not be treated as undiscovered.

watchlist.name: 良信股份
watchlist.why: Potential hidden beneficiary if AI data centers require more low-voltage distribution and protection gear.

watchlist.name: 可立克
watchlist.why: More upstream than visible server-power vendors; could benefit from higher-power rack architecture if server power magnetic components ramp.

watchlist.name: 回天新材
watchlist.why: Possible second-order thermal-management consumables exposure after liquid-cooling integrators become crowded.
to_verify: AI server or data-center product evidence

watchlist.name: 硅宝科技
watchlist.why: Could map to thermal and sealing materials, but AI data-center purity is not yet proven.

watchlist.name: 聚辰股份
watchlist.why: Memory-wall and DDR5 server penetration could create second-order module-support demand; less direct than Montage.

watchlist.name: 国科微
watchlist.why: Potential inference-storage read-through, but current AI capex linkage is weak and requires proof.

gray_list.name: 中熔电气
gray_list.reason: Power protection logic is relevant, but it may already be partly recognized by the market.

gray_list.name: 宏发股份
gray_list.reason: Relay / HVDC logic is relevant, but institutional coverage has started.

gray_list.name: 飞荣达
gray_list.reason: Thermal/EMI logic exists, but AI server exposure and crowding need checking.

gray_list.name: 中石科技
gray_list.reason: Thermal-material logic exists, but AI server revenue proof is required.

next_steps: Pull 3M/6M/1Y price performance and valuation snapshots for each candidate.
Check 2025 annual reports and 2026 Q1 reports for AI data-center, server, HVDC, DDR5, thermal, or customer language.
Remove names that have already been repriced or lack company-level revenue evidence.
Only after evidence review, decide whether any candidate deserves inclusion in the low-crowding watch basket.
